goal_text:
You are planning your trip in Cambridge.
You are looking for a 'train'. The train should depart from 'leicester' and should leave on 'wednesday'.
The train should 'arrive by 12:15' and should go to 'cambridge'.
Make sure you get 'departure time'.
You are also looking for a 'particular hotel'. Its name is called 'allenbell'.
Make sure you get 'postcode' and 'area'.Remember. You don't want booking for train. Just get the information and it all done.
Remember. You don't want booking for accomodation. Just get the information and it all done.

message: You are planning your trip in Cambridge
You are looking for a train. The train should depart from leicester and should leave on wednesday
The train should arrive by 12:15 and should go to cambridge
Make sure you get departure time
You are also looking for a particular hotel. Its name is called allenbell
Make sure you get postcode and area
